title: Swallow Flight
content:
I love my hour of wind and light,
I love men�s faces and their eyes,
I love my spirit�s veering flight
Like swallows under evening skies.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Sara Teasdale delivers a powerful performance in "Swallow Flight"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
